title: PokeCenter [Cobblemon]
description: Adds functional pokecentres to spawn in the world
body: ![lgoo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6f1b9005df50a8fc4965a18de016ab47cb42404.png) *** ## Pokemon Centers for Cobblemon    **__Dependencies:__** #### This addon NEEDS to be placed in the DATAPACK FOLDER within your world folder.     __**OTHER MODS REQUIRED:**__ * framed blocks   More mods are planned to be used in the future, all of which will be included in the modpack. **_(modpack under construction)_** *** This mod adds Pokecentres that randomly spawn in the world, **_villages_** do. The models are designed by me, and made to emulate the look of buildings and the pixel art from the earlier pokemon games.       *** ##### __**Planned updates / Roadmap:**__ * Redesign    *** ## Screenshots:   > These screenshot might not represent the pack the best. As it would differ based on your FOV and resolution.   ![outside](https://i.imgur.com/X5LwqxI.png) ![inside](https://i.imgur.com/PkwWs4x.png)
